title: sim/events.py Protocol methods missing -> None annotation
description:
Eight `SimulatorObserver` Protocol methods in `src/lichen/sim/events.py` are missing `-> None` return type annotations:

- Line 185: `on_tx_start()`
- Line 204: `on_tx_complete()`
- Line 221: `on_rx_start()`
- Line 246: `on_rx_complete()`
- Line 261: `on_collision()`
- Line 278: `on_drop()`
- Line 297: `on_node_state_change()`
- Line 351: `ObserverBus.notify()`
